title: Landmark Crash Investigations Timeline
description: Remember (Bloom L1) landmark aircraft accident investigations and the forensic advance each produced, on an interactive, filterable timeline.
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
Aviation Crash Forensics
History of Accident Investigation
bloomLevel: Remember (L1) — identify landmark aircraft accident investigations and the forensic advance each produced.
chapter_title: Aviation Crash Forensics and Aircraft Accident Investigation

learningObjectives: Identify eight landmark crash investigations and the year each occurred.
Match each investigation to the forensic technique or safety reform it advanced.
educational.prerequisites: Familiarity with the chapter's forensic techniques (recorders, metallurgy, human factors)

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Hover-and-click timeline: hover for a summary, click for the key finding; filter by forensic-lesson theme
pedagogical.assessment: Students match each crash to the technique or reform it produced
pedagogical.modelType: Interactive vis-timeline with theme filters and zoom/pan
controls: Theme filter buttons (structural, human factors, explosion/reconstruction, recorders)
